description.zh-cn: 搜索增强：默认数据库驱动开箱可用(商品名/简介模糊匹配 + 同义词扩展 + 热搜词 + 搜索建议 + 无结果热销推荐)，可选切换 Meilisearch 驱动(HTTP 接入，支持重建索引)。自动记录搜索词形成热搜榜。
description.en: Search Plus: works out of the box with a database driver (fuzzy name/summary match + synonym expansion + hot keywords + suggestions + no-result best-seller fallback), optionally switch to Meilisearch (HTTP, with reindex). Logs queries into a hot-search board.
